# foliate-js vendor

Source: https://github.com/johnfactotum/foliate-js
Commit: 78914aef4466eb960965702401634c2cb348e9b1
License: MIT

This copy is scoped to Yomitomo's EPUB/AZW3/MOBI renderer. `view.js` keeps EPUB loading and restores the upstream MOBI/KF8 adapter plus its `fflate` helper. PDF, FB2, and comic-book adapters remain intentionally excluded.
